chapter_title: Registration of Off-Highway Vehicles; Original and Renewal of Identification; Issuance of Certificates of Ownership
text: No off-highway motor vehicle subject to identification which has been reported dismantled or sold as salvage may be subsequently identified until it has been inspected by the department.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.5. OFF-HIGHWAY VEHICLES [38000 - 38604]
### Chapter 2. Registration of Off-Highway Vehicles; Original and Renewal of Identification; Issuance of Certificates of Ownership [38010 - 38265]
#### Article 7. Dismantling of Off-Highway Motor Vehicles [38180 - 38185]
##### § 38185

No off-highway motor vehicle subject to identification which has been reported dismantled or sold as salvage may be subsequently identified until it has been inspected by the department.

*(Added by Stats. 1971, Ch. 1816.)*

subsections.text: No off-highway motor vehicle subject to identification which has been reported dismantled or sold as salvage may be subsequently identified until it has been inspected by the department.
